search_query: index=windows EventCode=4769 TicketOptions="0x40810000" TicketEncryptionType="0x17" | table _time, Computer, TargetUserName, ServiceName, IpAddress | rename TargetUserName as "Potential_Attacker", ServiceName as "Target_Service"
description: Detects Kerberos Service Ticket requests using RC4 encryption (0x17). This is a strong indicator of a Kerberoasting attack, where an attacker requests service tickets to crack the service account passwords offline.
